title: Rubik's Cube — How the puzzle achieved success
content_html:
Rubik's Cube — How the puzzle achieved success

Erno Rubik first studied sculpture and then later architecture in Budapest, where he went on to become a teacher of interior design. It was while he was working as a teacher that he began the preliminary work on an invention that he called the 'Magic Cube'. Rubik was inspired by geometric puzzles such as the Chinese tangram, a puzzle consisting of various triangles, a square and a parallelogram which can be combined to create different shapes and figures. However, unlike the tangram, which is two-dimensional, Rubik was more interested in investigating how three-dimensional forms, such as the cube, could be moved and combined to produce other forms.

His design consisted of a cube made up of layers of individual smaller cubes, and each smaller cube could be turned in any direction except diagonally. To ensure that the cubes could move independently, without falling apart, Rubik first attempted to join them together using elastic bands. However, this proved to be impossible, so Rubik then solved the problem by assembling them using a rounded interior. This permitted them to move smoothly and easily. He experimented with different ways of marking the smaller cubes, but ended up with the simple solution of giving a different colour to each side. The object was to twist the layers of small cubes so that each side of the large cube was an identical colour.

Rubik took out a patent for the Cube in 1977 and started manufacturing it in the same year. The Cube came to the attention of a Hungarian businessman, Tibor Laczi, who then demonstrated it at the Nuremberg Toy Fair. When British toy expert Tom Kremer saw it, he thought it was amazing and he persuaded a manufacturer, Ideal Toys, to produce 1 million of them in 1979. Ideal Toys renamed the Cube after the toy's inventor, and in 1980, Rubik's Cube was shown at toy fairs all over the world. It won that year's prize in Germany for Best Puzzle. Rubik's Cube is believed to be the world's best-selling puzzle; since its invention, more than 300 million Cubes have been sold worldwide.

questions.question: Originally named the 1 ________, Rubik's Cube...
questions.groupHtml:
Questions 1–7

Complete the summary below.

Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.explanation: EN: Rubik began work on an invention 'that he called the Magic Cube'. VI: Rubik bắt đầu nghiên cứu một phát minh 'mà ông gọi là Magic Cube'.

_blockConfig.noteContent:
Originally named the [1], Rubik’s Cube consists of a number of smaller cubes organised in [2]. The smaller cubes can be twisted in almost any way, though not [3]. The Cube’s [4] is shaped in a way that allows the smaller cubes to move smoothly. Each side of the smaller cubes has a different colour, and the aim of the puzzle is to organise the cubes so that the colours on the sides of the large cube are [5].
The manufacturers of the puzzle changed the name of the Cube to the name of its [6]. It has now sold more than any other [7] in the world.

questions.questionHtml:
Rubik’s Cube

Originally named the 1_______, Rubik’s Cube consists of a number of smaller cubes organised in 2_______. The smaller cubes can be twisted in almost any way, though not 3_______. The Cube’s 4_______ is shaped in a way that allows the smaller cubes to move smoothly. Each side of the smaller cubes has a different colour, and the aim of the puzzle is to organise the cubes so that the colours on the sides of the large cube are 5_______.

The manufacturers of the puzzle changed the name of the Cube to the name of its 6_______. It has now sold more than any other 7_______ in the world.

questions.question: consists of a number of smaller cubes organised in 2 ________.
questions.explanation: EN: 'made up of layers of individual smaller cubes'. VI: 'được cấu tạo từ các lớp hình lập phương nhỏ hơn riêng biệt'.

questions.question: The smaller cubes can be twisted in almost any way, though not 3 ________.
questions.explanation: EN: 'could be turned in any direction except diagonally'. VI: 'có thể xoay theo mọi hướng ngoại trừ xoay chéo'.

questions.question: The Cube's 4 ________ is shaped in a way that allows them to move smoothly.
questions.explanation: EN: 'assembling them using a rounded interior. This permitted them to move smoothly'. VI: 'lắp ghép chúng sử dụng một phần bên trong được bo tròn. Điều này cho phép chúng chuyển động mượt mà'.

questions.question: the aim is to organise the cubes so that the colours on the sides are 5 ________.
questions.explanation: EN: 'so that each side of the large cube was an identical colour'. VI: 'sao cho mỗi mặt của khối lập phương lớn có màu sắc đồng nhất'.

questions.question: The manufacturers changed the name to the name of its 6 ________.
questions.explanation: EN: 'renamed the Cube after the toy's inventor'. VI: 'đổi tên khối lập phương theo tên nhà phát minh của món đồ chơi'.

questions.question: It has now sold more than any other 7 ________ in the world.
questions.explanation: EN: 'world's best-selling puzzle; since its invention...'. VI: 'món đồ chơi xếp hình bán chạy nhất thế giới; kể từ khi phát minh...'

questions.question: preliminary
questions.groupHtml:
Questions 8–13

Match each statement with the correct option, A–F.

Write the correct letter in boxes 8–13 on your answer sheet.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword: preliminary.
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn: Đoạn 1: "...he began the preliminary work on an invention that he called the “Magic Cube”."
Bước 3: Phân tích: Trong văn cảnh, Erno Rubik bắt đầu những công việc "sơ bộ, mở đầu" cho một phát minh mới. Điều này trùng khớp hoàn toàn với định nghĩa c: được làm hoặc xảy ra nhằm chuẩn bị cho sự kiện hoặc hoạt động chính (done or happening in order to prepare for the main event or activity).

_blockConfig.noteContent:
**A type of parrot:**
- diet consists of fern fronds, various parts of a tree and [1]
- nests are created in [2] where eggs are laid.
**Arrival of settlers**
- the [3] of the kākāpō were used to make clothes.
featureOptions: build something by joining parts together
done or happening in order to prepare for the main event or activity
try something in order to discover what it is like
try to do something, especially something difficult

questions.questionHtml:
List of features

A  break into pieces

B  build something by joining parts together

C  done or happening in order to prepare for the main event or activity

D  the purpose of something

E  try something in order to discover what it is like

F  try to do something, especially something difficult

8_______ preliminary (adjective)

9_______ fall apart-

10_______ attempt

11_______ assemble

12_______ experiment

13_______ object-

questions.question: fall apart
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword: falling apart.
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn: Đoạn 3: "To ensure that the cubes could move independently, without falling apart, Rubik first..."
Bước 3: Phân tích: Tác giả nhắc đến việc giữ cho các khối lập phương nhỏ di chuyển độc lập mà không bị "rời ra, vỡ vụn". Định nghĩa này tương ứng với câu a: vỡ thành nhiều mảnh (break into pieces).

questions.question: attempt
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword: attempted.
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn: Đoạn 3: "...Rubik first attempted to join them together using elastic bands."
Bước 3: Phân tích: Rubik đã "cố gắng/thử" gắn kết các khối nhỏ lại với nhau bằng dây thun. Hành động này trùng khớp với định nghĩa f: cố gắng làm một điều gì đó, đặc biệt là việc khó khăn (try to do something, especially something difficult).

questions.question: assemble
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword: assembling.
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn: Đoạn 3: "...so Rubik then solved the problem by assembling them using a rounded interior."
Bước 3: Phân tích: Từ "assembling" ở đây chỉ việc "lắp ráp" các bộ phận lại với nhau để giải quyết vấn đề cấu trúc của khối lập phương. Nó khớp với định nghĩa b: chế tạo thứ gì đó bằng cách kết hợp các bộ phận lại với nhau (build something by joining parts together).

questions.question: experiment
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword: experimented.
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn: Đoạn 3: "He experimented with different ways of marking the smaller cubes..."
Bước 3: Phân tích: Rubik đã "thử nghiệm" nhiều cách khác nhau để đánh dấu các khối nhỏ nhằm tìm ra giải pháp. Hành động này tương ứng với định nghĩa e: thử làm một điều gì đó để khám phá xem nó như thế nào (try something in order to discover what it is like).

questions.question: object
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword: object.
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn: Đoạn 3: "The object was to twist the layers of small cubes so that each side of the large cube was an identical colour."
Bước 3: Phân tích: Từ "object" trong câu này mang ý nghĩa là "mục tiêu, mục đích" của trò chơi (xoay các lớp sao cho mỗi mặt có một màu đồng nhất). Do đó, nó đi kèm với định nghĩa d: mục đích của một cái gì đó (the purpose of something).
